title: Add larger sizes for WorkDoc Actions feature
excerpt: Currently, WorkDoc Actions only support small, medium, and large sizes. The largest size is still very small. For example, a datepicker can’t fit inside of it. The size of the window greatly limits the amount of things t…

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, WorkDoc Actions only support small, medium, and large sizes. The largest size is still very small. For example, a datepicker can’t fit inside of it. The size of the window greatly limits the amount of things that can be built into WorkDocs. It would be great if larger sizes were added or custom sizes could be set.
